perks.summary: train a MultitaskRegressor for solubility (Delaney ECFP benchmark or custom SMILES CSV), evaluate, and predict new molecules
train a molecular graph neural network (gcn/gat/attentivefp/mpnn/dmpnn) on a MoleculeNet benchmark or custom SMILES CSV and evaluate it
fine-tune a pretrained molecular model (chemberta/grover/molformer) on a property-prediction task and evaluate it
